Polyacetyleneanditshomologueshavebeenstudiedas tion andforliquid-mixture separation[4],chiro-optical materials5,6]side-chainliquidcrystals[79],marals for chemical sensors[10],andmaterialsfor nonlinear opticalproperty11,12]andphotoluminescenceandelectroluminescenceproperties [13–17].

Polyacetylenes withionicnaturehavepotentialasmaterialsformixedionicandelectronicconductivities,energy storage devices suchasbatteries andpermselective membrane,andlight-emittingdevicesduetothetheirextensive conjugationand variousfunctionalities [2,18].Thesynthesis of simple mono- and disubstituted ionic polyacetylenes fromethynylpyridineshadbeencarriedoutwiththeactivationoftheacetylenebondinethynylpyridines[18,19].We havealso studiedonthesynthesisand characterizationof thepoly(2-ethynylpyridine)-basedconjugatedpolymers having variousfunctionalities [2,9,14].
In this paper, we reportthe synthesis ofnovelionic conjugated polymers having differentcounter-anion (iodide,tetraphenylborate)andthecharacterizationofresulting ionic conjugated polymers.

Theconjugated ionicpolymer,poly(2-ethynyl-N-methylpyridiniumiodide)(PEMPI)waspreparedbythedirect polymerization of 2-ethynylpyridine with methyliodide without any initiator system in methanol solvent. The polymerization was performed at 70 Cafter standing for1hbecauseofthelowboilingtemperatureofmethyl iodide. Another ionicpolymer,poly(2-ethynyl-N-methylpyridinium tetraphenylborate)(PEMPTPB) was easily prepared bythe ion-exchange reactionofPEMPIwith sodium tetraphenylborateinmethanolsolvent.FT-IRspectrawere obtained witha BrukerEQUINOX55 spectrometerusing aKBrpellet.NMRspectrawererecordedonaVarian500MHz FT-NMR spectrometer(Model: UnityINOVA)in $\mathrm{DMSO-d_{6}}$ .X-ray diffractograms were obtained with a Phillips X-ray diffractometer (Model: XPert-APD).
